case_title: RAINBOW PUBLISHING INC DBA THE GAYBOOK VS NORLIN RON DBA TH MAILHOUSE

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NORLIN RON DBA TH MAILHOUSE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $556.96 FILED BY RAINBOW PUBLISHING INC DBA THE GAYBOOK AS TO DEFENDANT NORLIN RON DBA TH MAILHOUSE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-25-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00

TRIAL RESET TO NOV-22-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02 TRIAL OF OCT-25-1991 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
